description.ko: AQUA-5 탐사선이 빛나는 해양 생물과 고대 수중 지형에 둘러싸인 채, 침묵하는 심해의 비밀을 밝혀내는 미지의 바다 깊은 곳으로의 여정입니다.
description.en: Journey into the unknown depths of the ocean where the AQUA-5 probe uncovers the secrets of the silent abyss, surrounded by glowing sea life and ancient underwater formations.

prompt: Cinematic shot of the deep ocean floor, bioluminescent organisms glowing in neon blue and violet, mysterious advanced metallic structure labeled AQUA-5 partially buried in the silt, ethereal rays of light filtering from far above through dark obsidian water, hyper-realistic, 8k resolution, volumetric lighting, silent atmosphere.
